# Lomita Shooters League (LSL)

> Virtual token-only shooting league. Live matches, gang leaderboards, and risk-free wagering using in-app tokens.

LSL is a fan-driven competitive shooting circuit. Users register, join a gang, follow live matches, place virtual-token bets on outcomes, and climb seasonal leaderboards. No real-money gambling.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured matches, live odds, hot bets, and grand-prize winners.
- [Matches](/matches): Browse all upcoming, live, and finished matches.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Top shooters and top gangs ranked by season points.
- [Gangs](/gangs): All gangs competing in the league.
- [About](/about): The league's story, rules, and why to trust us.
- [Sign in](/login): Existing-member sign-in.
- [Join the League](/register): Create an account and start betting.

## Optional

- [Support](/support): Help center and contact options.
- [Achievements](/achievements): User badges and rewards.
